meaning: n.剥头皮的人,做投机抽头的人,黄牛党,黄牛,圆凿
examples: That is the word today, scalper, and wedding banquet scalper, and ticket scalper.
Michael: Actually I don't have a ticket yet - I will try to buy one from a scalper.
We are able to get ticket to the “AndyLau” concert from a scalper outside the stadium.
When the iPad 2 was released last year, a skirmish broke out outside a Beijing Apple Store after a man believed to be a scalper was escorted away by security after trying to cut in line.
